  • Method Details

    • getIssues

      @GetMapping("/projects/{projectId}/issues") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.data.domain.Page<IssueResponse>> getIssues(@PathVariable Long projectId, @RequestParam(required=false) Issue.IssueType type, @RequestParam(required=false) Issue.Priority priority, @RequestParam(required=false) Issue.IssueStatus status, @RequestParam(required=false) Long assigneeId, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") int page, @RequestParam(defaultValue="20") int size)

    • getIssue

      @GetMapping("/issues/{issueId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<IssueResponse> getIssue(@PathVariable Long issueId)

    • createIssue

      @PostMapping("/projects/{projectId}/issues") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<IssueResponse> createIssue(@PathVariable Long projectId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid CreateIssueRequest request, @AuthenticationPrincipal User currentUser)

    • updateIssue

      @PutMapping("/issues/{issueId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<IssueResponse> updateIssue(@PathVariable Long issueId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid UpdateIssueRequest request, @AuthenticationPrincipal User currentUser)

    • updateStatus

      @PatchMapping("/issues/{issueId}/status") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<IssueResponse> updateStatus(@PathVariable Long issueId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid UpdateStatusRequest request, @AuthenticationPrincipal User currentUser)

    • deleteIssue

      @DeleteMapping("/issues/{issueId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteIssue(@PathVariable Long issueId)
